description: Welcome to Rocklin on the Creek by Woodbridge Homes - a rare end-unit townhome backing onto a peaceful greenbelt. This bright home offers 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and approx. 1,610 sq. ft. of thoughtfully designed living space with. The main level features an open-concept layout with 9-ft ceilings, oversized windows, and a gourmet kitchen complete with stone/quartz counters, gas cooktop, KitchenAid appliances, custom cabinetry. Entertain effortlessly with a built-in bar and step out to a private fenced yard with patio and gas BBQ hookup. Upstairs includes three spacious bedrooms, a vaulted-ceiling primary with ensuite, and convenient laundry. Finished double garage with a flexible den/office or storage. Surrounded by trails and nature, yet minutes to schools, shopping, parks and recreation
